example.target: Traži novo zaposlenje u Zagrebu.
example.gloss: She is looking for a new job in Zagreb.

example.target: Moje radno mjesto je blizu kolodvora.
example.gloss: My workplace is near the station.

example.target: Poslala sam životopis na deset adresa.
example.gloss: I sent my CV to ten addresses.

words.note: molba za posao = job application; gen. pl. molbi

example.target: Napisao je molbu za posao.
example.gloss: He wrote a job application.

example.target: Sutra ujutro imam razgovor za posao.
example.gloss: Tomorrow morning I have a job interview.

example.target: Potpisali smo ugovor o radu.
example.gloss: We signed an employment contract.

words.note: vrijeme is n. n., gen. vremena

example.target: Naše radno vrijeme je od osam do četiri.
example.gloss: Our working hours are from eight to four.

example.target: Ovaj tjedan radim noćnu smjenu.
example.gloss: This week I am working the night shift.

words.note: usually plural: prekovremeni sati = overtime hours

example.target: Često radim prekovremene sate.
example.gloss: I often work overtime hours.

words.note: biti u mirovini = to be retired

example.target: Moj djed je već pet godina u mirovini.
example.gloss: My grandfather has been retired for five years.

words.note: dati otkaz = to quit; dobiti otkaz = to be fired

example.target: Dala je otkaz i otišla u Njemačku.
example.gloss: She quit her job and went to Germany.

example.target: Ivan je jučer dobio otkaz.
example.gloss: Ivan got fired yesterday.

example.target: Tvrtka zapošljava dvjesto radnika.
example.gloss: The company employs two hundred workers.

words.note: impf. zapošljavati; zaposliti se = to get a job

example.target: Zaposlili su me u banci.
example.gloss: They hired me at a bank.

example.target: Želim napredovati u svojoj karijeri.
example.gloss: I want to advance in my career.

example.target: Imam pet godina radnog iskustva.
example.gloss: I have five years of work experience.

example.target: Komunikacijske vještine su danas jako važne.
example.gloss: Communication skills are very important today.

example.target: Projekt je bio velik uspjeh.
example.gloss: The project was a big success.

example.target: Počela je karijeru kao novinarka.
example.gloss: She started her career as a journalist.

example.target: Sindikat štiti prava radnika.
example.gloss: The union protects workers' rights.

words.note: otvoriti obrt = to open a small business

example.target: Moj susjed ima frizerski obrt.
example.gloss: My neighbour has a hairdressing business.

example.target: Za članak je dobio dobar honorar.
example.gloss: He got a good fee for the article.

words.note: from platiti; dobro plaćen = well paid

example.target: Taj posao je dobro plaćen.
example.gloss: That job is well paid.

example.target: Volontira u knjižnici svake subote.
example.gloss: She volunteers at the library every Saturday.

example.target: Moj poslodavac je jako korektan.
example.gloss: My employer is very fair.

example.target: Tvrtka ima sto zaposlenika.
example.gloss: The company has a hundred employees.

example.target: On je moj najbolji suradnik.
example.gloss: He is my best associate.

example.target: Hvala vam na dobroj suradnji.
example.gloss: Thank you for the good cooperation.

words.note: prijaviti se na natječaj = to apply for a vacancy

example.target: Prijavila se na natječaj za posao.
example.gloss: She applied for the job vacancy.

example.target: Poslao sam prijavu prošli tjedan.
example.gloss: I sent the application last week.

example.target: Znanje engleskog je glavni uvjet.
example.gloss: Knowledge of English is the main requirement.

example.target: Imam previše obveza na poslu.
example.gloss: I have too many obligations at work.

example.target: Novi posao nosi veliku odgovornost.
example.gloss: The new job carries great responsibility.

example.target: Moja dužnost je pomoći kolegama.
example.gloss: My duty is to help my colleagues.

example.target: Trebamo stručan savjet odvjetnika.
example.gloss: We need a lawyer's expert advice.

example.target: Ona je vrlo sposobna radnica.
example.gloss: She is a very capable worker.

example.target: Njezin brat je uspješan poduzetnik.
example.gloss: Her brother is a successful entrepreneur.

example.target: Zarada ovisi o broju sati.
example.gloss: Earnings depend on the number of hours.

example.target: Koliko novca zarađuješ svaki mjesec?
example.gloss: How much money do you earn every month?

example.target: Ovaj mjesec je zaradio tisuću eura.
example.gloss: He earned a thousand euros this month.

example.target: Tvrtka je otpustila deset radnika.
example.gloss: The company laid off ten workers.

example.target: Imamo stanku za ručak u podne.
example.gloss: We have a lunch break at noon.

words.note: f. ravnateljica; of schools, hospitals, museums

example.target: Ravnatelj škole je vrlo strog.
example.gloss: The school principal is very strict.

example.target: Naš voditelj vodi tjedne sastanke.
example.gloss: Our manager leads the weekly meetings.

words.note: at work; a sports team is momčad

example.target: Radim u malom, ali dobrom timu.
example.gloss: I work in a small but good team.

example.target: U kolovozu idem na godišnji odmor.
example.gloss: In August I am going on annual leave.

words.note: biti na bolovanju = to be on sick leave

example.target: Kolegica je tjedan dana na bolovanju.
example.gloss: My colleague has been on sick leave for a week.

example.target: Ima trideset godina radnog staža.
example.gloss: He has thirty years of service.

example.target: Na razgovor je došlo pet kandidata.
example.gloss: Five candidates came to the interview.

example.target: Molim vas, potpišite ovaj ugovor.
example.gloss: Please sign this contract.

example.target: Zdravlje je najvažnije u životu.
example.gloss: Health is the most important thing in life.

example.target: Gripa je česta bolest zimi.
example.gloss: The flu is a common illness in winter.

example.target: Danas sam bolestan i ostajem doma.
example.gloss: I am sick today and staying at home.

example.target: Cijela obitelj ima gripu ovaj tjedan.
example.gloss: The whole family has the flu this week.

example.target: Imam jaku prehladu i kašljem.
example.gloss: I have a bad cold and I am coughing.

words.note: imati temperaturu = to have a fever

example.target: Dijete ima visoku temperaturu od jučer.
example.gloss: The child has had a high fever since yesterday.

example.target: Kašalj me muči već tjedan dana.
example.gloss: The cough has been bothering me for a week.

example.target: Noću jako kašljem i ne spavam.
example.gloss: At night I cough a lot and do not sleep.

example.target: Zbog alergije stalno kišem.
example.gloss: Because of my allergy I sneeze all the time.

example.target: Imam alergiju na pelud i prašinu.
example.gloss: I am allergic to pollen and dust.

example.target: Igrač ima tešku ozljedu koljena.
example.gloss: The player has a serious knee injury.

example.target: Liječnik je očistio ranu na ruci.
example.gloss: The doctor cleaned the wound on the arm.

example.target: Sutra ujutro idem vaditi krv.
example.gloss: Tomorrow morning I am going to have blood drawn.

example.target: Baka ima visok krvni tlak.
example.gloss: Grandma has high blood pressure.

example.target: Idem na pregled kod liječnika u osam.
example.gloss: I am going to a doctor's check-up at eight.

words.note: medical sense; the cooking 'recipe' is a separate entry

example.target: Ovaj lijek ide samo na recept.
example.gloss: This medicine is available only on prescription.

example.target: Trebam uputnicu za pregled kod specijalista.
example.gloss: I need a referral for an examination by a specialist.

example.target: U čekaonici je bilo puno ljudi.
example.gloss: There were a lot of people in the waiting room.

words.note: pomoć is n. f., gen. pomoći

example.target: Odmah smo nazvali hitnu pomoć.
example.gloss: We called an ambulance right away.

words.note: f. ljekarnica; works in a ljekarna

example.target: Ljekarnik mi je preporučio ovaj sirup.
example.gloss: The pharmacist recommended this syrup to me.

example.target: Uzimam tablete dva puta dnevno.
example.gloss: I take the pills twice a day.

example.target: Kupila sam sirup protiv kašlja.
example.gloss: I bought some cough syrup.

example.target: Namažite ranu ovom mašću.
example.gloss: Apply this ointment to the wound.

example.target: Sestra mi je stavila zavoj na ruku.
example.gloss: The nurse put a bandage on my arm.

example.target: Moje se dijete jako boji injekcija.
example.gloss: My child is very afraid of injections.

words.note: used in both aspects; cijepiti koga = to vaccinate sb

example.target: Svake se jeseni cijepim protiv gripe.
example.gloss: Every autumn I get vaccinated against the flu.

example.target: Prehladio sam se na moru.
example.gloss: I caught a cold at the seaside.

example.target: Razboljela se dan prije puta.
example.gloss: She fell ill the day before the trip.

example.target: Brzo se oporavio nakon operacije.
example.gloss: He recovered quickly after the operation.

example.target: Pij čaj i brzo ćeš ozdraviti.
example.gloss: Drink tea and you will get well quickly.

words.note: pf. osjetiti se; Kako se osjećaš?

example.target: Danas se osjećam puno bolje.
example.gloss: Today I feel much better.

example.target: Ujutro često imam vrtoglavicu.
example.gloss: In the morning I often feel dizzy.

example.target: Poslije ručka osjećam mučninu.
example.gloss: After lunch I feel nauseous.

words.note: impf. lomiti; slomiti nogu = to break a leg

example.target: Slomila je nogu na skijanju.
example.gloss: She broke her leg while skiing.

example.target: Osjećam jaku bol u leđima.
example.gloss: I feel a strong pain in my back.

example.target: Od jutra imam strašnu glavobolju.
example.gloss: I have had a terrible headache since morning.

example.target: Liječnik dugo razgovara s pacijentom.
example.gloss: The doctor talks with the patient for a long time.

example.target: Visoka temperatura je simptom gripe.
example.gloss: A high fever is a symptom of the flu.

example.target: Liječnica mi je rekla dijagnozu.
example.gloss: The doctor told me the diagnosis.

example.target: Moja terapija traje točno dva tjedna.
example.gloss: My treatment lasts exactly two weeks.

example.target: Operacija koljena je dobro prošla.
example.gloss: The knee operation went well.

words.note: impf. naručivati se; naručiti se kod liječnika

example.target: Naručio sam se kod zubara za petak.
example.gloss: I made an appointment with the dentist for Friday.

example.target: Ordinacija radi od osam do dva.
example.gloss: The doctor's office is open from eight to two.

example.target: Noću se jako znojim zbog temperature.
example.gloss: At night I sweat a lot because of the fever.

example.target: Teško dišem kad brzo hodam.
example.gloss: I breathe with difficulty when I walk fast.

example.target: Imam upalu grla i uha.
example.gloss: I have a throat and ear infection.

example.target: Boli me grlo već tri dana.
example.gloss: My throat has been hurting for three days.

example.target: Zimi mi je koža jako suha.
example.gloss: In winter my skin is very dry.

example.target: Poslije treninga me bole mišići.
example.gloss: After training my muscles hurt.

example.target: Rendgen je pokazao da kost nije slomljena.
example.gloss: The X-ray showed that the bone is not broken.

example.target: Banka se nalazi na glavnom trgu.
example.gloss: The bank is located on the main square.

words.note: bank account, restaurant bill and shop receipt

example.target: Molim vas račun, plaćam karticom.
example.gloss: The bill please, I am paying by card.

example.target: Jučer sam izgubila svoju bankovnu karticu.
example.gloss: Yesterday I lost my bank card.

example.target: Plaćate li gotovinom ili karticom?
example.gloss: Are you paying in cash or by card?

example.target: Bankomat je odmah iza ugla.
example.gloss: The ATM is just around the corner.

example.target: U mjenjačnici sam promijenio sto dolara.
example.gloss: I exchanged a hundred dollars at the exchange office.

words.note: here = exchange rate; the 'course, class' sense is a separate entry

example.target: Kakav je danas tečaj dolara?
example.gloss: What is the dollar exchange rate today?

example.target: Novac obično podižem na bankomatu.
example.gloss: I usually withdraw money at the ATM.

example.target: Podigla je novac sa svog računa.
example.gloss: She withdrew money from her account.

example.target: Uplata stiže na račun za dva dana.
example.gloss: The payment arrives in the account in two days.

example.target: Isplata plaće je svakog petog u mjesecu.
example.gloss: Salaries are paid out on the fifth of every month.

example.target: Uzeli su kredit za novi stan.
example.gloss: They took out a loan for a new flat.

example.target: Kamate na kredit su ove godine visoke.
example.gloss: Interest rates on loans are high this year.

example.target: Svu štednju držim u banci.
example.gloss: I keep all my savings in the bank.

example.target: Čekali smo na šalteru pola sata.
example.gloss: We waited at the counter for half an hour.

words.note: stajati u redu = to stand in line; also 'order, tidiness'

example.target: Pred šalterom je bio dug red.
example.gloss: There was a long queue in front of the counter.

words.note: rubber stamp; a postage stamp is marka

example.target: Dokument treba potpis i pečat.
example.gloss: The document needs a signature and a stamp.

example.target: Upišite svoje osobne podatke u obrazac.
example.gloss: Enter your personal data in the form.

words.en: to register / to apply / to log in

example.target: Prijavio sam se za tečaj hrvatskoga.
example.gloss: I signed up for a Croatian course.

example.target: Prije selidbe se moraš odjaviti s adrese.
example.gloss: Before moving you have to deregister from the address.

example.target: Vjenčali su se u matičnom uredu.
example.gloss: They got married at the registry office.

words.note: vozačka dozvola = driving licence; radna dozvola = work permit

example.target: Čekam radnu dozvolu već dva mjeseca.
example.gloss: I have been waiting for a work permit for two months.

words.note: boravak = stay, residence; gen. boravka (fleeting a)

example.target: Prijavio je privremeni boravak u Splitu.
example.gloss: He registered temporary residence in Split.

example.target: Gradska uprava radi do tri sata.
example.gloss: The city administration is open until three o'clock.

example.target: Svaki mjesec plaćamo porez državi.
example.gloss: Every month we pay tax to the state.

example.target: Bez zdravstvenog osiguranja pregled je skup.
example.gloss: Without health insurance an examination is expensive.

example.target: Za banku trebam potvrdu o zaposlenju.
example.gloss: For the bank I need a certificate of employment.

words.note: predati zahtjev = to submit an application

example.target: Predao je zahtjev za novu putovnicu.
example.gloss: He submitted an application for a new passport.

example.target: Pristojba za putovnicu iznosi četrdeset eura.
example.gloss: The passport fee is forty euros.

example.target: Banka naplaćuje malu mjesečnu naknadu.
example.gloss: The bank charges a small monthly fee.

example.target: Ispunite ovaj obrazac velikim slovima.
example.gloss: Fill in this form in capital letters.

example.target: Zahtjev sam predala na šalteru.
example.gloss: I handed in the application at the counter.

example.target: Euro je službena valuta u Hrvatskoj.
example.gloss: The euro is the official currency in Croatia.

example.target: Ovaj kaput košta osamdeset eura.
example.gloss: This coat costs eighty euros.

example.target: Banka nudi nove usluge preko interneta.
example.gloss: The bank offers new services over the internet.

words.note: also 'political party'; a foreigner is stranac

example.target: Službenica prima stranke do podneva.
example.gloss: The clerk sees clients until noon.

example.target: Službenik mi je pomogao s obrascem.
example.gloss: The clerk helped me with the form.

example.target: Pošiljka iz Njemačke stigla je danas.
example.gloss: The parcel from Germany arrived today.

example.target: Dostava je besplatna iznad pedeset eura.
example.gloss: Delivery is free above fifty euros.

example.target: Paket će dostaviti u petak ujutro.
example.gloss: They will deliver the package on Friday morning.

words.note: impf. posuđivati; means both lend and borrow

example.target: Možeš li mi posuditi deset eura?
example.gloss: Can you lend me ten euros?

example.target: Dugujem ti novac za ručak.
example.gloss: I owe you money for lunch.

example.target: Plaćanje karticom je vrlo jednostavno.
example.gloss: Paying by card is very simple.

example.target: Na vratima je bila važna obavijest.
example.gloss: There was an important notice on the door.

example.target: Dobio sam termin za sljedeći utorak.
example.gloss: I got an appointment for next Tuesday.

example.target: Ovaj tjedan moram produljiti vozačku dozvolu.
example.gloss: This week I have to renew my driving licence.

words.en: to be valid / to be worth

example.target: Moja putovnica vrijedi još deset godina.
example.gloss: My passport is valid for ten more years.

example.target: Osobna iskaznica mi je istekla u svibnju.
example.gloss: My ID card expired in May.

example.target: Moram obnoviti ugovor s bankom.
example.gloss: I have to renew my contract with the bank.

example.target: Donesite kopiju osobne iskaznice.
example.gloss: Bring a copy of your ID card.

words.note: ići u kupovinu = to go shopping

example.target: Subotom idemo u veliku kupovinu.
example.gloss: On Saturdays we do a big shopping trip.

example.target: Prodavačica ljubazno razgovara s kupcem.
example.gloss: The shop assistant talks politely with the customer.

example.target: Zakon štiti prava potrošača.
example.gloss: The law protects consumers' rights.

example.target: Cijene su porasle ovog ljeta.
example.gloss: Prices have risen this summer.

example.target: Studenti imaju popust od deset posto.
example.gloss: Students get a ten percent discount.

example.target: Kupila sam kaput na sniženju.
example.gloss: I bought a coat on sale.

example.target: U siječnju počinje velika rasprodaja.
example.gloss: The big clearance sale starts in January.

example.target: Na blagajni je bio velik red.
example.gloss: There was a big queue at the checkout.

example.target: Blagajnik mi je vratio ostatak novca.
example.gloss: The cashier gave me back my change.

words.note: diminutive of košara; also the online cart

example.target: Stavila je mlijeko u košaricu.
example.gloss: She put the milk in the basket.

words.note: a postage stamp is just marka

example.target: Ova robna marka je vrlo poznata.
example.gloss: This brand is very well known.

example.target: Domaći proizvodi su često skuplji.
example.gloss: Local products are often more expensive.

example.target: Nova roba stiže svakog ponedjeljka.
example.gloss: New goods arrive every Monday.

example.target: Cijena ovisi o kvaliteti proizvoda.
example.gloss: The price depends on the quality of the product.

example.target: Ljeti kupujemo velike količine vode.
example.gloss: In summer we buy large quantities of water.

example.target: Televizor ima jamstvo od dvije godine.
example.gloss: The TV has a two-year warranty.

example.target: Mogu li zamijeniti ovu majicu za veću?
example.gloss: Can I exchange this T-shirt for a bigger one?

words.note: vratiti (pf.) / vraćati (impf.) = to give back; vratiti se = to come back

example.target: Želim vratiti ove cipele jer su male.
example.gloss: I want to return these shoes because they are small.

example.target: Napisala je reklamaciju zbog pokvarenog mobitela.
example.gloss: She wrote a complaint about the broken mobile phone.

example.target: Potrošili smo previše novca na odmoru.
example.gloss: We spent too much money on holiday.

example.target: Trošimo puno novca na hranu.
example.gloss: We spend a lot of money on food.

example.target: Cijelu godinu štedimo za novi automobil.
example.gloss: We have been saving all year for a new car.

example.target: Uštedjela je tisuću eura za putovanje.
example.gloss: She saved a thousand euros for the trip.

words.note: f. povoljna; povoljna cijena = good price

example.target: Našli smo stan po povoljnoj cijeni.
example.gloss: We found a flat at an affordable price.

example.target: Ulaz u muzej je danas besplatan.
example.gloss: Entry to the museum is free today.

words.en: to try on / to try out

example.target: Mogu li isprobati ovu haljinu?
example.gloss: Can I try on this dress?

example.target: U izlogu sam vidjela lijepu torbu.
example.gloss: I saw a nice bag in the shop window.

example.target: Dječji odjel je na drugom katu.
example.gloss: The children's department is on the second floor.

example.target: Vikendom je trgovački centar pun ljudi.
example.gloss: On weekends the shopping mall is full of people.

example.target: Idem u supermarket po kruh i mlijeko.
example.gloss: I am going to the supermarket for bread and milk.

example.target: Na kiosku kupujem novine i karte.
example.gloss: I buy newspapers and tickets at the kiosk.

example.target: Ponuda voća na tržnici je odlična.
example.gloss: The range of fruit at the market is excellent.

example.target: U ovoj trgovini je velik izbor sireva.
example.gloss: There is a large selection of cheeses in this shop.

example.target: Dugo je birala poklon za mamu.
example.gloss: She spent a long time choosing a present for her mum.

example.target: Na kraju je izabrala plavu haljinu.
example.gloss: In the end she chose the blue dress.

example.target: Možete li mi preporučiti dobro vino?
example.gloss: Can you recommend a good wine to me?

example.target: Uvijek usporedim cijene u dvije trgovine.
example.gloss: I always compare prices in two shops.

example.target: Konobar nam je naplatio dvije kave.
example.gloss: The waiter charged us for two coffees.

words.note: na akciji = on special offer; also 'action'

example.target: Ovaj sir je danas na akciji.
example.gloss: This cheese is on special offer today.

example.target: Moja narudžba stiže za tri dana.
example.gloss: My order arrives in three days.

example.target: Često kupujem preko internetske trgovine.
example.gloss: I often buy through an online shop.

example.target: Ova prodavaonica radi i nedjeljom.
example.gloss: This shop is open on Sundays too.

example.target: Stan je u prodaji od ožujka.
example.gloss: The flat has been on the market since March.

example.target: Na tržnici prodaju svježe povrće.
example.gloss: They sell fresh vegetables at the market.

example.target: Prodali su staru kuću na moru.
example.gloss: They sold the old house by the sea.

example.target: Cjenik pića visi pokraj blagajne.
example.gloss: The drinks price list hangs next to the till.

example.target: Nedjeljom je trgovina zatvorena.
example.gloss: The shop is closed on Sundays.

example.target: S kuponom imaš deset posto popusta.
example.gloss: With the coupon you get a ten percent discount.

example.target: Vrijednost stana raste svake godine.
example.gloss: The value of the flat grows every year.

example.target: Kupili smo kvalitetan i povoljan namještaj.
example.gloss: We bought high-quality and affordable furniture.
